description.en: Get available time slots for a Cal.com event type within a date range.
description.de: Verfügbare Zeitfenster für einen Cal.com-Ereignistyp innerhalb eines Datumsbereichs abrufen.

vars.API_KEY: env:CAL_COM_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cal.com Settings > Developer > API Keys at https://app.cal.com/settings/developer/api-keys

inputs.name: Event Type ID

description.en: The ID of the event type to check availability for.
description.de: Die ID des Ereignistyps, für den die Verfügbarkeit geprüft werden soll.

inputs.bot: The numeric ID of the Cal.com event type. Use the list event types warp to find available event type IDs.

inputs.name: Start Date

description.en: Start date for slot search in UTC (e.g., '2024-09-05').
description.de: Startdatum für die Suche in UTC (z.B. '2024-09-05').

inputs.bot: The start date from which to fetch available slots, in UTC date format like '2024-09-05'.

inputs.name: End Date

description.en: End date for slot search in UTC (e.g., '2024-09-06').
description.de: Enddatum für die Suche in UTC (z.B. '2024-09-06').

inputs.bot: The end date until which to fetch available slots, in UTC date format like '2024-09-06'.

inputs.name: Time Zone

description.en: Time zone for the returned slots (e.g., 'Europe/Berlin', 'America/New_York'). Defaults to UTC.
description.de: Zeitzone für die zurückgegebenen Slots (z.B. 'Europe/Berlin', 'America/New_York'). Standard ist UTC.

inputs.bot: The time zone in which slots should be returned, e.g. 'America/New_York'. Defaults to UTC if not provided.

inputs.name: Duration

description.en: Duration of each slot in minutes. Only needed for event types that allow multiple durations.
description.de: Dauer jedes Zeitfensters in Minuten. Nur nötig für Ereignistypen mit mehreren Dauern.

inputs.bot: Slot duration in minutes. Only use for event types that allow multiple durations. If not passed, defaults to the event type's default duration.
